title: Karisal Kaattu Penne Lyrics Raja
stanzas:
oosiela kaattukulla
othayila porapulla
maaman niyabagathil
yaara thaedi ingu
paattu nee padicha

karisal kaattu penne
en avanai kandaayaa
kavidhai pesum kannae
en avanai kandaayaa

konjam kanavu koduthavan
en thookkam thirudi sendraan
ennai thannil inaithavan
indru yeno thaniye sendraan

karisal kaattu penne
en avanai kandaayaa
kavidhai pesum kannae
en avanai kandaayaa

orumurai paarthaal
uyirvarai verthaen
asaivathil aasai
aadhigam ennai thindraane.

ava mattum ingae
oru nodi vandhaal
arai dozen pillai
pettru kayyil tharuvene

avan malligai
udhadugal pudikkum
avan marbin
mudigal pudikkum
avan sandhana niramo
pudikkum
konjam saaikindra
nadayum pudikkum

en avanukku mattum
yaanai balathil
ezhu ..
avan oruviral theendi
norungidave naan
uyirai valarthaene

karisal kaattu penne
en avanai kandaayaa
kavidhai pesum kannae
en avanai kandaayaa

avan kural kaettu
dhisaigal ellaam
pudhu pudhu kolam
potu vaithaen

en thaavani
vayadhugal poche
oru aayiram
valar pirai aache
andha ratchasan
yaen varavillai.
innum pookkudai
saaindhida illai.

en madiyinil orunaal
thalai vaithu thoongum
azhagai naam paarpen.

karisal kaattu penne
en avanai kandaayaa
kavidhai pesum kannae
en avanai kandaayaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Karisal Kaattu Penne?

The song explores themes of longing and love, with a melancholic yet romantic undertone.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the renowned playback singer K.S.Chitra.

Who composed the music for Raja?

The music for the movie Raja was composed by S.A.Rajkumar.

What is the release year of the movie Raja?

The movie Raja was released in the year 2002.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Karisal Kaattu Penne from the movie Raja is a poignant melody that delves into the emotions of longing and love. Sung by K.S.Chitra, the song's lyrics express a deep yearning for a loved one, set against the backdrop of a rural landscape. S.A.Rajkumar's music beautifully complements the melancholic yet romantic mood, making it a memorable piece. The song evokes a sense of nostalgia and emotional depth, resonating with anyone who has experienced love and separation.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the haunting melody of Karisal Kaattu Penne from the movie Raja, where K.S.Chitra's soulful voice meets S.A.Rajkumar's evocative music. This song beautifully captures the essence of longing and love, making it a timeless classic. Dive into the emotional depth and lyrical beauty that has captivated audiences since its release.
stanzaMeanings: In the middle of the forest, on a lonely path, who are you singing for, remembering him?
Girl from the dry lands, have you seen him? Eyes that speak poetry, have you seen him?
The one who lives between my eyes, have you seen him?
The one who cut the nerves of my heart, have you seen him?
The one who gave me dreams, stole my sleep and left me alone today.
The one who lives between my eyes, have you seen him?
The one who cut the nerves of your heart, have you seen him?
Girl from the dry lands, have you seen him? Eyes that speak poetry, have you seen him?
When I saw him once, I felt alive. His movements made me desire more, he consumed me.
If she comes here for a moment, I will give her half a dozen children.
I like his jasmine-like lips, his chest, his sandalwood scent, and his gentle walk.
For him alone, I grew strong like an elephant. With a touch of his finger, I nurtured my life.
Girl from the dry lands, have you seen him? Eyes that speak poetry, have you seen him?
I waited for years, hoping he would come in minutes.
Hearing his voice, I decorated all directions with new designs.
My youthful days are gone, a thousand crescent moons have passed, yet that demon hasn't come. The flower umbrella hasn't bent yet.
My twenties will pass, even my seventies, but I won't leave him.
One day, we will see the beauty of him resting his head on my lap and sleeping.
Girl from the dry lands, have you seen him? Eyes that speak poetry, have you seen him?
